description_long: This object appears to be a highly abstracted or distorted representation of a human figure, possibly intended to depict a pedestrian adult. The form is angular and elongated, with sharp, planar surfaces and a lack of discernible anatomical detail. The surface is predominantly dark brown with some lighter and reddish patches, suggesting stylized clothing or shading. There are no visible facial features, limbs, or clear separation between body parts, making the figure appear almost origami-like or as if constructed from folded, flat materials. The overall silhouette is irregular, with some protruding and receding sections that break up the outline. The object gives the impression of a modern, artistic interpretation of a person rather than a realistic depiction.
description: An abstract, angular, and stylized human figure with sharp, planar surfaces and a predominantly dark brown coloration.
description_view_0: A sharply angled, dark brown surface with a long, thin edge visible, showing little anatomical detail.
description_view_1: A mostly white, flat plane with a sharp corner, offering minimal visual information about the figure.
description_view_2: A view of the angular body with some reddish and white patches, hinting at stylized clothing or shading.
description_view_3: A more complex, folded surface with dark and reddish tones, showing the most detail of the abstract form.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted, angular garment with no discernible style or features
